title: Duretia longispica

taxonomy: Duretia longispica is classified as a species of moth in the family Erebidae. The genus Duretia is part of the subfamily Arctiinae, commonly known as the tiger moths. Within the family Erebidae, Duretia longispica belongs to the order Lepidoptera. Lepidoptera is a large order of insects that includes butterflies and moths. This classification highlights Duretia longispica's position within the larger taxonomic hierarchy of insects.
